task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tor Project History page using Tor Browser
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Tor Browser window open with the address bar showing 'https://www.torproject.org/about/history/'.

task_completion.description: Save a full-page screenshot of the History page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog, file manager, or terminal confirming a screenshot was saved as '/home/ga/Documents/history_evidence.png'. The image preview should show a tall, full-page capture.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tor Project Community page using Tor Browser
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Tor Browser window open with the address bar showing 'https://community.torproject.org/'.

task_completion.description: Save a full-page screenshot of the Community page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog, file manager, or terminal confirming a screenshot was saved as '/home/ga/Documents/community_evidence.png'. The image preview should show a tall, full-page capture.

task_completion.description: Calculate SHA-256 hashes for both screenshot files
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window showing a command like 'sha256sum' executed on both 'history_evidence.png' and 'community_evidence.png', displaying their respective hash values.

task_completion.description: Document the hashes in the chain of custody text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output (e.g., using 'cat' or 'echo') showing the creation or contents of '/home/ga/Documents/chain_of_custody.txt', containing the two SHA-256 hash strings.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used Tor Browser, not a standard web browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Tor Browser logo, the onion icon in the toolbar, or 'Tor Browser' in the application window title.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots are full-page captures, not just the visible viewport
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at any image previews or properties; the images should appear very tall (minimum 1500px height) and capture content well beyond a single screen's scroll depth.

integrity.description: Verify that the hashes were genuinely calculated from the files
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the hashes saved in the text file match the output of the hash calculation command in the terminal, and are not just random strings or fabricated text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URLs: 'https://www.torproject.org/about/history/' and 'https://community.torproject.org/'. Expected screenshot paths: '/home/ga/Documents/history_evidence.png' and '/home/ga/Documents/community_evidence.png'. Expected hash document path: '/home/ga/Documents/chain_of_custody.txt'. Full-page screenshots are expected to have a minimum height of 1500 pixels and a minimum file size of 102400 bytes.
